creators.name: Nick Saraev
creators.blurb: Practical AI automation and agency builds from someone shipping real systems.

videos.title: I Built a $1M/y SaaS with Claude Code, Here's How
videos.summary: Nick Saraev describes building Clairvo, a $1M/year ARR SaaS using Claude Code and AI agents that optimizes call pickup rates through algorithmic predictive pacing and local number rotations. He guides viewers through the product development loop, pricing strategy, and emphasizes that human moats and practical execution win over pure model capability.

videos.title: How to Build Mobile Apps with Claude Code: Full Course (2026)
videos.summary: A full-length video course demonstrating how to build iOS and Android mobile apps using Claude Code. The tutorial covers setup, app frameworks like Expo and React Native, database integration with Supabase, AI features, authentication, and app store submission for three example apps: a habit tracker, calorie tracker, and Pomodoro app.

videos.title: How to Use Claude Code for FREE (2026)
videos.summary: Nick Saraev demonstrates how to access Claude Code for free or low cost using alternative API providers and local models. The tutorial covers setup with OpenRouter, NVIDIA-NIM, and Ollama, as well as cost-effective alternatives like DeepSeek V4 Flash.

videos.title: Claude Opus-4.7 Just Dropped, And...
videos.summary: Nick Saraev discusses the release of Claude Opus-4.7 and emphasizes practical, revenue-generating applications of AI automation. The video focuses on real-world business systems rather than theoretical AI capabilities.
